## Testing checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (all existing + new tests green)
- [ ] New unit tests added for any new logic
- [ ] Story added for any new UI component
- [ ] `play` function added if the story has user interaction
- [ ] Chromatic visual diff reviewed and approved (if UI changed)
